css: .pepl-pf-wrap{font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#222;line-height:1.4}.pepl-pf-wrap h1{font-size:18px;color:#1a3a5c;margin:0 0 4px 0}.pepl-pf-wrap h2{font-size:13px;color:#1a3a5c;margin:18px 0 6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #d4d3cd;padding-bottom:3px}.pepl-pf-wrap h3{font-size:12px;color:#1a3a5c;margin:12px 0 4px 0}.pepl-pf-meta{width:100%;margin-bottom:8px}.pepl-pf-meta td{padding:2px 6px;font-size:10px}.pepl-pf-meta td:nth-child(odd){color:#73726c;width:18%}.pepl-pf-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:10px}.pepl-pf-table th{background:#1a3a5c;color:#fff;padding:5px 6px;text-align:left;font-weight:600}.pepl-pf-table td{padding:4px 6px;border-bottom:1px solid #e8e7e0;vertical-align:top}.pepl-pf-table .num{text-align:right}.pepl-pf-itemblock{border:1px solid #d4d3cd;border-radius:4px;padding:8px;margin-bottom:10px;background:#fdfcf7;page-break-inside:avoid}.pepl-pf-required{font-size:10px;color:#5f5e5a;margin-bottom:6px}.pepl-pf-badge{display:inline-block;padding:1px 5px;background:#e6f4ea;color:#0f6e56;border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600}.pepl-pf-badge-amber{background:#fff4e0;color:#854f0b}.pepl-pf-foot{margin-top:20px;font-size:9px;color:#73726c;border-top:1px solid #d4d3cd;padding-top:6px}
html:
{%- set comp = doc -%} {%- set log_entries = frappe.parse_json(comp.override_log or '[]') or [] -%} {%- set rate_overrides = log_entries | selectattr('type','equalto','rate_override') | list -%} {%- set qty_overrides = log_entries | selectattr('type','equalto','qty_override') | list -%} {%- set items_grouped = {} -%} {%- for row in comp.comparison_items -%} {%- if row.item_code not in items_grouped -%} {%- set _ = items_grouped.update({row.item_code: []}) -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set _ = items_grouped[row.item_code].append(row) -%} {%- endfor -%}

Quotation Comparison Snapshot

Comparison ID{{ comp.name }} RFQ{{ comp.linked_rfq }}
Date{{ frappe.format(comp.comparison_date, {'fieldtype':'Date'}) }} Status{{ comp.status }}
Approved By{{ comp.approved_by or '—' }} Approved On{{ frappe.format(comp.approved_on, {'fieldtype':'Datetime'}) if comp.approved_on else '—' }}
Total Award{{ frappe.format(comp.total_award_value, {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) }} Vendors / Items{{ comp.vendor_count or 0 }} vendor(s), {{ comp.item_count or 0 }} item(s)

Items and Awarded Allocations

{% for item_code, rows in items_grouped.items() %}

{{ rows[0].item_name or item_code }} ({{ item_code }})

Required: {{ rows[0].required_qty }} {{ rows[0].uom or '' }}  |  Required by: {{ frappe.format(rows[0].required_by, {'fieldtype':'Date'}) if rows[0].required_by else '—' }}
{% set ns = namespace(any_alloc=false) %} {% for row in rows %} {% if row.selected_vendor and row.qty %} {% set ns.any_alloc = true %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if not ns.any_alloc %} {% endif %}
Vendor Allocated Qty Selected Rate Original Quote Amount Rate Override Reason
{{ row.selected_vendor }} {{ row.qty }} {{ frappe.format(row.selected_rate, {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) }} {{ frappe.format(row.original_quoted_rate, {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) if row.original_quoted_rate else '—' }} {{ frappe.format((row.qty or 0) * (row.selected_rate or 0), {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) }} {{ row.override_reason or '—' }}
No vendor allocated for this item.
{% endfor %}

All Vendor Responses (Quotes Received)

Item Vendor Quoted Rate Lead Time Rank Supplier Quotation
{{ r.item_code }} {{ r.vendor }} {{ frappe.format(r.quoted_rate, {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) }} {{ r.lead_time_days }} d L{{ r.ranking }} {{ r.supplier_quotation }}
No quotes received.

TypeItemVendorDetailReasonUserWhen
Rate {{ e.item_code }} {{ e.vendor or '—' }} {{ frappe.format(e.old_rate, {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) }} → {{ frappe.format(e.new_rate, {'fieldtype':'Currency'}) }} {{ e.reason }} {{ e.user }} {{ e.ts }}
Qty {{ e.item_code }} — Qty mismatch override {{ e.reason }} {{ e.user }} {{ e.ts }}
